headlines.title: Inflation expected to jump to a 3-year high as Iran war continues to fuel rising prices
headlines.description: April inflation data is widely expected to show it has risen to a nearly 3-year high when the Consumer Price Index is released Tuesday.

headlines.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'on massive life support'
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters the Iranian response to a U.S. peace proposal was “stupid” and that the ceasefire is “on massive life support.” NBC News' Jon Allen reports on the war's impasse and how Trump responded to questions over his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping later in the week.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Trump says he would support suspending the federal gas tax
headlines.description: Suspending the federal gas tax would require congressional approval, and it could cost the government billions of dollars in revenue.

headlines.title: Tuesday’s primaries to set up key fall matchups in Nebraska
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary elections in Nebraska will set the stage for November in a battleground House district, as well as a potentially competitive Senate contest, as Democrats try to win control of Congress.

headlines.title: The revolt against i-Ready: Private equity-backed company faces parent, teacher and student fury
headlines.description: A growing number of families and educators say they’re fed up with i-Ready’s personalized math and reading lessons, which feature repetitive cartoons and slow voice-overs.

headlines.title: Inside American passengers’ journey home from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
headlines.description: The 18 Americans evacuated from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship arrived at medical facilities in Omaha and Atlanta. One passenger who tested mildly positive and another showing symptoms were placed in isolation. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

headlines.title: Fake Trump and Oprah ads fuel a wave of Medicare scams on Facebook, report says
headlines.description: Meta, the parent of Facebook and Instagram, is failing to stop scammers who repeatedly buy ads on the platforms to target seniors with scams, a new report says.

headlines.title: Beatles museum to open at site of iconic rooftop concert
headlines.description: Beatles museum to open at site of iconic rooftop concert

headlines.title: Texas man flees to Italy after arrest in wife's murder
headlines.description: Texas man flees to Italy after arrest in wife's murder
